title: Builder.sbomScan(): don't break non-root scanners
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Set up permissions on the scanner output directory so that scanners whose images specify that they be run as non-root users can still write to it.  The most recent ghcr.io/anchore/syft image exposed our bug.

#### How to verify it

SBOM-scanning tests should succeed again.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
